title: Annakili Lyrics Pattra Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Pattra Annakili paathadhilla Song Lyrics
Movie:Pattra,
Music:Sri Krishna
Singers:Santhosh & Malavika

Annakili paathadhilla
avaarampoo paathadilla
kannae un kanna paathaa
thaevayilla cinmea
un kannakuli azhagula
naan odureny padamaa

Deivamagal paarthadilla
thaevarmagan paarthadhilla
kannaa un kanna paarthu
kalangurene varundhi
nee kalyanam pannikitta
pogamaaten velagi.

Annakili paathadhilla
avaarampoo paathadilla
kanna un kanna paathaa
thaevayilla cinmea
un kannakuli azhagula
naan odureny padamaa

sandakozhi paarthadhilla
saadhimalli paarthadhill
adiye unna paarthu
adureney nadanam
un kaalu solusula
en kaalamellam saranam

Paayumpuli paarthadhilla
pazhum pazhamum paarthadhilla
paavi naan unna paarthu
pozhiyiene mazhayaa
nee urusanam paakkum munne
ottikanum murayaa

Nee sirichaa thala padame
kai ananjaa
color varaipadame

nee asanjaa color padame
kai ananjaa
naan eduppen un idupula
oru kadhal padam.

Annakili paathadhilla
avaarampoo paathadilla
kannae un kanna paathaa
thaevayilla cinmea
un kannakuli azhagula
naan odureny padamaa

Velakaaran paarthadhilla
vettaikaran paarthadhill
aaruge unna paarthu
asayireney kodiyaa
nee alumbu pannaama
allikolla rediyaa

Aanpaavam paarthadhilla
annaamalai paarthadhilla
maaney un manasa paarthu
thaeyireney nelavaa
nee azhaga enna vettum
iyanaaru aruvaa

Nee kuninjaa kuru nadanam
thozh nimindhaa
adhil adi padamaa

nee thuninjaa tamil padamaa
naan rasippen
naan rasippen
en usurula ...

Annakili paathadhilla
avaarampoo paathadilla
kanna un kanna paathaa
thaevayilla cinmea
un kannakuli azhagula
naan odureny padamaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Annakili?

The song Annakili expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, reflecting the emotions of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie Pattra?

Pattra revolves around themes of love and relationships, where this song plays a significant role in showcasing the protagonists' emotions.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Santhosh and Malavika, whose voices complement each other beautifully.

Who is the music director for Annakili?

The music for Annakili is composed by Sri Krishna, known for his melodious tunes.

When was the song released?

Annakili was released on March 12, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Annakili from Pattra, the characters express their deep romantic feelings and the longing that comes with love. The melody beautifully captures the essence of their emotions, evoking a sense of nostalgia and tenderness. As the singers convey their heartfelt sentiments, listeners are drawn into the enchanting world of romance depicted in the movie. This song serves as a poignant reminder of the beauty of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Annakili from Pattra is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With Sri Krishna's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a world of heartfelt emotions. The collaboration between the singers adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The song lyrics are from the movie Pattra, sung by Santhosh and Malavika. The lyrics express that looking at your eyes is enough, and I am captivated by their beauty.
I haven't seen the divine girl, nor the divine man. Looking into your eyes makes me feel overwhelmed, and I won't let you go without getting married.
The song lyrics are from the movie Pattra, sung by Santhosh and Malavika. The lyrics express that looking at your eyes is enough, and I am captivated by their beauty.
I haven't seen the rooster, nor the peacock. Looking at you makes me dance, and your feet are my refuge.
I haven't seen the snake, nor the old fruit. I am mesmerized by you, and before the rain comes, I need to act quickly.
If you smile, the colors will come alive.
If you don't smile, I will take a picture of you in my heart as a love story.
The song lyrics are from the movie Pattra, sung by Santhosh and Malavika. The lyrics express that looking at your eyes is enough, and I am captivated by their beauty.
I haven't seen the farmer, nor the hunter. Looking at you makes me desire you, and you should not be careless.
I haven't seen the poor man, nor the mountain. Looking at your heart makes me feel like a mother, and your beauty is like a shining moon.
If you dance gracefully, it will be a beautiful sight.
If you sing in Tamil, I will enjoy it, I will enjoy it with all my heart...
The song lyrics are from the movie Pattra, sung by Santhosh and Malavika. The lyrics express that looking at your eyes is enough, and I am captivated by their beauty.
I am captivated by your beautiful eyes.
